exams.title: Đề Cương Kiểm Tra Giữa Kỳ II - Tiếng Anh 9
exams.subject: Tiếng Anh 9

sections.title: I. LANGUAGE FOCUS
sections.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B, C, or D to complete each of the sentences.

questions.question: Choose the word A, B, C or D that has a different stress pattern.
questions.explanation: 'location' có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ 2 (lo-CA-tion /ləʊˈkeɪʃən/), trong khi 'paradise', 'natural', 'tropical' đều có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ 1.
questions.expansion: Quy tắc: Các từ có đuôi -tion, -sion thường có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết ngay trước đuôi. Ví dụ: education (e-du-CA-tion), information (in-for-MA-tion).

questions.question: Choose the word A, B, C or D that has a different stress pattern.
questions.explanation: 'generous' có trọng âm ở âm tiết thứ 1 (GE-ne-rous /ˈdʒenərəs/). Các từ còn lại: authentic (au-THEN-tic), amazing (a-MA-zing), natural (cũng âm tiết 1 nhưng pattern khác).
questions.expansion: Từ 'generous' (adj) = hào phóng, rộng lượng. Các từ liên quan: generosity (n), generously (adv).

questions.question: Choose the word A, B, C or D that has a different stress pattern.
questions.explanation: 'visit' có trọng âm ở âm tiết thứ 1 (VI-sit /ˈvɪzɪt/), trong khi 'admire' (ad-MIRE), 'explore' (ex-PLORE), 'support' (su-PPORT) đều có trọng âm ở âm tiết thứ 2.
questions.expansion: Quy tắc: Nhiều động từ 2 âm tiết trong tiếng Anh có trọng âm ở âm tiết thứ 2. Ngoại lệ phổ biến: visit, enter, offer, happen.

questions.question: Choose the word A, B, C or D which has a different sound in the underlined part.
questions.explanation: 'father' có âm /ɑː/ (fA-ther), trong khi 'family', 'happen', 'matter' đều có âm /æ/ (fA-mily, hA-ppen, mA-tter).
questions.expansion: Phân biệt /ɑː/ và /æ/: /ɑː/ là nguyên âm dài, miệng mở rộng (car, far, father). /æ/ là nguyên âm ngắn (cat, hat, map).

questions.question: Choose the word A, B, C or D which has a different sound in the underlined part.
questions.explanation: 'near' có âm /ɪə/ (nIEr), trong khi 'bear', 'wear', 'pear' đều có âm /eə/ (bEAr, wEAr, pEAr).
questions.expansion: Nhóm từ có âm /eə/: bear, wear, pear, care, share, dare. Nhóm từ có âm /ɪə/: near, hear, dear, fear, clear.

questions.question: Choose the word A, B, C or D which has a different sound in the underlined part.
questions.explanation: 'email' có âm /iː/ (E-mail), trong khi 'elegant', 'special', 'network' đều có âm /e/ ngắn.
questions.expansion: Chữ 'e' trong tiếng Anh có thể phát âm: /iː/ (email, he, she), /e/ (elegant, let, bed), /ɪ/ (enough, English).

questions.question: He looked so funny; we couldn't help _______ at him.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'can't help + V-ing' = không thể nhịn được, không thể tránh được. 'We couldn't help laughing' = Chúng tôi không thể nhịn cười.
questions.expansion: Các cấu trúc tương tự: can't stand + V-ing (không chịu nổi), can't bear + V-ing (không chịu nổi), it's no use + V-ing (vô ích).

questions.question: She asked the children _______ listening to her.
questions.explanation: Câu tường thuật (reported speech) dạng câu hỏi Yes/No: S + asked + O + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì). 'Are they listening?' → 'if they were listening'.
questions.expansion: Reported speech - Yes/No questions: Dùng if/whether. Lùi thì: are → were, is → was, do → did, will → would, can → could.

questions.question: Most countries in Southeast Asia have floating markets, _______ attract western visitors.
questions.explanation: 'which' là đại từ quan hệ thay thế cho 'floating markets' (vật). Dùng 'which' cho vật, 'who' cho người.
questions.expansion: Relative pronouns: who (người, chủ ngữ), whom (người, tân ngữ), which (vật), whose (sở hữu), that (người/vật, dùng trong mệnh đề xác định).

questions.question: We plan to visit Paris, _______ Eiffel Tower is world-famous.
questions.explanation: 'whose' dùng để chỉ sở hữu. 'Paris, whose Eiffel Tower is world-famous' = Paris, mà tháp Eiffel của nó nổi tiếng thế giới.
questions.expansion: 'Whose' có thể dùng cho cả người và vật trong mệnh đề quan hệ. Ví dụ: The house whose roof is red = Ngôi nhà mà mái của nó màu đỏ.

questions.question:
Mi: Can I borrow your English-English dictionary for a while, Nam?
Nam: _______
questions.explanation: 'Sure. Here you are' là cách trả lời tự nhiên nhất khi đồng ý cho mượn đồ. 'Here you are' = Đây, của bạn.
questions.expansion: Các cách đồng ý cho mượn: Sure, here you are. / Of course, go ahead. / No problem, help yourself. Cách từ chối lịch sự: I'm sorry, I'm using it right now.

questions.question: Nick asked Ann if she _______ on a tour of Hue that weekend.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: 'Are you going...?' → asked if she WAS GOING (lùi thì từ is going → was going). 'this weekend' → 'that weekend'.
questions.expansion: Tường thuật thì hiện tại tiếp diễn: am/is/are + V-ing → was/were + V-ing. Thay đổi trạng từ: this → that, now → then, today → that day.

questions.question: She _______ Italian when she was living in Rome.
questions.explanation: 'pick up' = học được (một cách tự nhiên, không chính thức). 'She picked up Italian' = Cô ấy học được tiếng Ý (khi sống ở Rome).
questions.expansion: Phrasal verbs với 'pick': pick up (nhặt lên / học được / đón), pick out (chọn ra), pick on (bắt nạt), pick off (bắn hạ từng cái một).

questions.question: This island has a very beautiful beach, but sadly it is not easily _______.
questions.explanation: 'inaccessible' (adj) = không thể tiếp cận, khó đến. Sau 'is not easily' cần tính từ. 'Not easily inaccessible' ≈ không dễ dàng không thể tiếp cận → khó đến.
questions.expansion: Word formation: access (n/v) → accessible (adj, có thể tiếp cận) → inaccessible (adj, không thể tiếp cận) → accessibility (n) → inaccessibility (n).

questions.question: Everyone of us has made a positive _______ to the overall success of the project.
questions.explanation: Sau 'a positive' cần danh từ. 'contribution' (n) = sự đóng góp. 'Made a positive contribution' = đã có đóng góp tích cực.
questions.expansion: Word family: contribute (v) → contribution (n) → contributor (n, người đóng góp) → contributing (adj, góp phần).

questions.question: There has been a _______ increase in the number of foreign tourists to Ha Long Bay, Viet Nam.
questions.explanation: Trước danh từ 'increase' cần tính từ. 'significant' (adj) = đáng kể. 'A significant increase' = sự gia tăng đáng kể.
questions.expansion: Word family: signify (v, biểu thị) → significant (adj, đáng kể) → significantly (adv) → significance (n, tầm quan trọng).

questions.question: The committee has _______ a survey of parking problems in residential areas.
questions.explanation: 'carry out' = thực hiện, tiến hành (a survey, a plan, an experiment). 'Carried out a survey' = thực hiện một cuộc khảo sát.
questions.expansion: Phrasal verbs hay gặp: carry out (thực hiện), carry on (tiếp tục), cut down (giảm bớt), come around (đến thăm / hồi tỉnh), work out (tập thể dục / giải quyết).

questions.question: When you _______ a word in the dictionary, remember to learn its pronunciation.
questions.explanation: 'look up' = tra (từ điển). 'Look up a word in the dictionary' = tra một từ trong từ điển.
questions.expansion: Phrasal verbs với 'look': look up (tra cứu), look after (chăm sóc), look for (tìm kiếm), look forward to (mong chờ), look into (điều tra).

questions.question: The ancient town of Hoi An is a well-known destination for _______.
questions.explanation: 'holidaymakers' = người đi nghỉ mát, du khách. Hội An là điểm đến nổi tiếng cho những người đi nghỉ mát.
questions.expansion: Vocabulary - Tourism: holidaymaker (người đi nghỉ), travel agent (đại lý du lịch), tour guide (hướng dẫn viên), backpacker (người du lịch bụi), sightseer (người đi ngắm cảnh).

questions.question: Woods and fields are typical features of the English _______.
questions.explanation: 'landscape' = phong cảnh, cảnh quan. 'Woods and fields are typical features of the English landscape' = Rừng và cánh đồng là đặc trưng của cảnh quan nước Anh.
questions.expansion: Vocabulary: landscape (cảnh quan), scenery (phong cảnh), view (tầm nhìn), countryside (vùng nông thôn), surroundings (môi trường xung quanh).

questions.question: _______ is for people who love trying different local dishes.
questions.explanation: 'Food tourism' = du lịch ẩm thực — dành cho những người thích thử các món ăn địa phương khác nhau.
questions.expansion: Types of tourism: Food tourism (ẩm thực), Ecotourism (sinh thái), Cultural tourism (văn hóa), Adventure tourism (mạo hiểm), Medical tourism (y tế), Heritage tourism (di sản).

questions.question:
Nick: Can I join your expedition to Quang Binh caves this summer?
Mi: _______
options: What can I do for you?
questions.explanation: 'Certainly. You're welcome!' là cách trả lời đồng ý nhiệt tình khi ai đó xin tham gia. = Chắc chắn rồi. Hoan nghênh bạn!
questions.expansion: Cách chấp nhận lời đề nghị: Certainly! / Of course! / Sure, why not? / Absolutely! Cách từ chối lịch sự: I'm afraid not. / Sorry, but...

questions.question: Remember to go _______ the words you have learnt in class.
questions.explanation: 'go over' = ôn lại, xem lại. 'Go over the words' = ôn lại các từ vựng.
questions.expansion: Phrasal verbs với 'go': go over (ôn lại), go on (tiếp tục), go through (trải qua), go off (nổ / kêu / hỏng), go ahead (tiến hành).

questions.question: The teacher asked his students to copy the new words _______ their notebooks.
questions.explanation: 'copy into' = chép vào. 'Copy the new words into their notebooks' = chép các từ mới vào vở.
questions.expansion: Giới từ chỉ hướng: into (vào trong), onto (lên trên), out of (ra khỏi), from (từ). 'Into' chỉ sự di chuyển từ ngoài vào trong.

questions.question: They spend a lot of time surfing the net; _______, they have little time to read books.
questions.explanation: 'therefore' = vì vậy, do đó. Vế 1 là nguyên nhân (dành nhiều thời gian lướt net) → vế 2 là kết quả (ít thời gian đọc sách).
questions.expansion: Linking words: therefore/consequently (kết quả), however/nevertheless (tương phản), moreover/furthermore (bổ sung), otherwise (nếu không thì).

questions.question: English is the language _______ is known as a global language.
questions.explanation: 'which' là đại từ quan hệ thay thế cho 'the language' (vật). 'The language which is known as a global language'.
questions.expansion: Đại từ quan hệ cho vật: which / that. Trong mệnh đề quan hệ xác định, có thể dùng 'that' thay cho 'which'. Trong mệnh đề không xác định (có dấu phẩy), chỉ dùng 'which'.

questions.question:
A: Son, good luck with your new job.
B: _______
options: Yes, I am doing a new job.
Thanks, Dad. I'll make you proud.
questions.explanation: 'Thanks, Dad. I'll make you proud.' là cách đáp lại lời chúc tự nhiên nhất. = Cảm ơn bố. Con sẽ làm bố tự hào.
questions.expansion: Cách đáp lại lời chúc: Thank you! / Thanks a lot! / That's very kind of you. / I appreciate it.

questions.question: That souvenir shop sells a lot of items, _______ they are all overpriced.
questions.explanation: 'but' = nhưng. Vế 1 (bán nhiều đồ) đối lập với vế 2 (tất cả đều đắt). 'But' dùng để nối hai ý tương phản.
questions.expansion: Liên từ đẳng lập (coordinating conjunctions): FANBOYS - For, And, Nor, But, Or, Yet, So. Mỗi từ có chức năng riêng.

questions.question: Most families in my village _______ their radios with TVs since 2000s.
questions.explanation: 'have replaced' — thì hiện tại hoàn thành (present perfect) vì có 'since 2000s' chỉ mốc thời gian kéo dài đến hiện tại.
questions.expansion: Dấu hiệu nhận biết Present Perfect: since + mốc thời gian, for + khoảng thời gian, already, yet, just, ever, never, so far, up to now, recently.

questions.question: I forgot my umbrella, _______ I got wet in the rain.
questions.explanation: 'so' = vì vậy. Quên ô (nguyên nhân) → bị ướt mưa (kết quả). 'So' nối nguyên nhân với kết quả.
questions.expansion: Phân biệt: so (kết quả), because (nguyên nhân), although (nhượng bộ), unless (trừ khi = if not).

questions.question: The garden has a _______ of colourful flowers and plants.
questions.explanation: 'a variety of' = nhiều loại, đa dạng. Đây là cụm từ cố định: a variety of + N (plural). 'A variety of colourful flowers' = nhiều loại hoa rực rỡ.
questions.expansion: Word family: vary (v, thay đổi) → various (adj, khác nhau) → variety (n, sự đa dạng) → variously (adv). Cụm: a (wide/great) variety of = nhiều loại.

questions.question: In the old days, transportation in my village _______ on buffalo-drawn cart.
questions.explanation: 'depended' — thì quá khứ đơn vì 'In the old days' (ngày xưa) chỉ thời gian trong quá khứ, hành động đã kết thúc.
questions.expansion: Dấu hiệu quá khứ đơn: in the old days, in the past, yesterday, last + time, ago, in + năm quá khứ.

sections.title: II. READING - Part 1A
sections.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B, C or D to fill in each blank in the following passage.
sections.passage: English is the world's most widely spoken language, and it is used extensively in the workplace. Fluency in English can significantly (1)_______ one's job prospects for a variety of reasons. First, many foreign companies use English as their primary language of (2)_______ and meetings. Therefore, individuals who can effectively communicate with colleagues and customers from various countries will have (3)_______ job opportunities. Furthermore, English is an important language in the field of technology (4)_______ it is used in the majority of research papers, technical documents, and software code. As a result, fluent English speakers can (5)_______ up to date on the latest developments in their fields. In general, a strong command of the English language is a valuable asset in the workplace, allowing people to pursue global job opportunities and stay at the forefront of their fields.

questions.explanation: 'improve' = cải thiện. 'Fluency in English can significantly improve one's job prospects' = Sự thông thạo tiếng Anh có thể cải thiện đáng kể triển vọng công việc.
questions.expansion: Collocations với 'improve': improve skills, improve performance, improve quality, improve chances/prospects.

questions.explanation: Sau 'language of' cần danh từ. 'communication' (n) = giao tiếp. 'Language of communication' = ngôn ngữ giao tiếp.
questions.expansion: Word family: communicate (v) → communication (n) → communicative (adj, hay giao tiếp) → communicator (n, người giao tiếp).

questions.explanation: 'better' = tốt hơn (so sánh hơn). Ngụ ý: người giỏi tiếng Anh sẽ có cơ hội việc làm TỐT HƠN so với người không giỏi.
questions.expansion: So sánh hơn của 'good': good → better → best. Cấu trúc: S + will have + better + N = sẽ có ... tốt hơn.

questions.explanation: 'because' = bởi vì. Tiếng Anh quan trọng trong công nghệ BỞI VÌ nó được sử dụng trong phần lớn tài liệu nghiên cứu.
questions.expansion: Liên từ chỉ nguyên nhân: because, since, as, due to, owing to. 'Because' là phổ biến nhất, theo sau bởi mệnh đề (S + V).

questions.explanation: 'stay up to date' = cập nhật, theo kịp thông tin mới nhất. 'Fluent English speakers can stay up to date on the latest developments'.
questions.expansion: Cụm từ: stay up to date (on/with) = cập nhật. Tương tự: keep up with = theo kịp, catch up with = bắt kịp.

sections.title: II. READING - Part 1B
sections.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B, C or D to fill in each blank in the following passage.
sections.passage:
The Harbour of Rio de Janeiro is one of the (1)_______ bays on Earth and is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. It is located in the city of Rio de Janeiro (2)_______ the southeastern coastline of Brazil. It is also known as Guanabara Bay. The harbour is surrounded by mountains and is connected to the sea via a series of channels.

The major (3)_______ of this natural wonder is its tropical climate, which attracts tourists from all over the world. It also has some beautiful beaches and lush forests (4)_______ provide recreation areas for visitors. Additionally, the mouth of the harbour is unique (5)_______ it resembles more of a river than a bay. This is the reason why the city has its name Rio de Janeiro, which means "River of January".

questions.explanation: 'largest' = lớn nhất (so sánh nhất). 'One of the largest bays on Earth' = một trong những vịnh lớn nhất trên Trái Đất. Cấu trúc: one of the + superlative + N(plural).
questions.expansion: Cấu trúc so sánh nhất: the + adj-est (1 âm tiết) / the most + adj (2+ âm tiết). 'One of the + superlative + Ns' = một trong những ... nhất.

questions.explanation: 'on the coastline' = trên bờ biển. Giới từ 'on' dùng cho bề mặt, đường bờ biển.
questions.expansion: Giới từ nơi chốn: on the coast/coastline, on the river/road, in the city/country, at the corner/station.

questions.explanation: 'attraction' (n) = điểm thu hút, sức hút. Sau 'The major' cần danh từ. 'The major attraction' = điểm thu hút chính.
questions.expansion: Word family: attract (v) → attraction (n, sức hút / điểm du lịch) → attractive (adj, hấp dẫn) → attractively (adv).

questions.explanation: 'which' là đại từ quan hệ thay thế cho 'beaches and lush forests' (vật). 'Forests which provide recreation areas'.
questions.expansion: Khi tiền ngữ (antecedent) là vật hoặc hỗn hợp người + vật, dùng 'which' hoặc 'that'.

questions.explanation: 'because' = bởi vì. Cửa vịnh độc đáo BỞI VÌ nó giống một con sông hơn là một vịnh.
questions.expansion: Phân biệt: because (nguyên nhân), although (nhượng bộ), if (điều kiện), where (nơi chốn).

sections.title: II. READING - Part 2A
sections.instruction: Read the passage about tourism in Viet Nam and choose the correct answer A, B, C or D to each of the questions.
sections.passage:
Tourism in Viet Nam has seen a lot of changes in recent years. For backpackers, culture and nature lovers, military veterans, Viet Nam has become a new tourist destination in Southeast Asia.

International tourist arrivals to Viet Nam have continuously risen. In 2008, Viet Nam received 4.218 million tourists. In 2012, the number rose to 6.84 million. Four years later, the country welcomed 10 million national visitors, and in 2019, it was 18 million. This increase made Viet Nam the fifth most visited country in the Asia-Pacific region.

By March 2023, the four countries with the largest numbers of visitors to Viet Nam are South Korea, the USA, Thailand, and China. The most attractive destinations in Viet Nam are national parks like Cuc Phuong, Phong Nha-Ke Bang, Cape Ca Mau, and World Heritage Sites like Ha Long Bay, Hue, and Hoi An.

Tourism is important to the country's economy. For example, in 2016, tourism contributed 6.6 per cent to gross domestic product (GDP) equal to VND 279,287 billion. It has also helped to promote the development of related sectors, such as hotels, transportation, entertainment, and food.

questions.question: Most tourists to Viet Nam are interested in its _______.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn đề cập 'For backpackers, culture and nature lovers' — du khách đến Việt Nam quan tâm đến văn hóa (culture).
questions.expansion: Kỹ năng đọc: Scanning — tìm thông tin cụ thể bằng cách lướt nhanh đoạn văn và tìm từ khóa.

questions.question: In 2019, the number of international tourists to Viet Nam was roughly _______ as big as that in 2008.
questions.explanation: 2008: 4.218 triệu, 2019: 18 triệu. 18 ÷ 4.218 ≈ 4.27 lần → roughly four times (khoảng 4 lần).
questions.expansion: Cách diễn đạt so sánh gấp bội: twice as big as (gấp 2), three times as big as (gấp 3), four times as big as (gấp 4).

questions.question: Phong Nha-Ke Bang is an example of a _______ in Viet Nam.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói: 'national parks like Cuc Phuong, Phong Nha-Ke Bang, Cape Ca Mau' → Phong Nha-Ke Bang là vườn quốc gia (national park).
questions.expansion: Phân biệt: national park (vườn quốc gia), World Heritage Site (di sản thế giới), historical site (di tích lịch sử), cultural destination (điểm đến văn hóa).

questions.question: The development of tourism _______ the development of transportation.
questions.explanation: Đoạn cuối: 'It has also helped to promote the development of related sectors, such as hotels, transportation...' → Du lịch DẪN ĐẾN (leads to) sự phát triển của giao thông.
questions.expansion: Kỹ năng đọc: Inference — suy luận từ thông tin trong bài. 'Helped to promote the development' ≈ leads to the development.

questions.question: The word "it" in paragraph 2 refers to _______.
questions.explanation: 'In 2012, the number rose to 6.84 million... and in 2019, IT was 18 million.' → 'it' thay thế cho 'the number of international tourists'.
questions.expansion: Kỹ năng đọc: Reference — xác định từ thay thế (pronoun reference). Đọc câu trước để tìm danh từ mà đại từ thay thế.

sections.title: II. READING - Part 2B
sections.instruction: Read the passage and choose the correct answer A, B, C or D to each of the questions.
sections.passage:
There are many ways to learn English, and each has its own benefits and effectiveness.

One popular method is learning English online. There are a lot of websites, apps and online courses that are suitable for different language levels. You can learn to read, write and speak English through video lessons, practice exercises and even real-time conversations with native speakers. However, it is important to remember that the internet alone might not be enough to help you learn well and improve your English language skills. It is essential to support your online learning with other activities and resources.

Another good way is reading English books, newspapers or magazines. This activity can help you learn new words, improve your grammar and grasp sentence structure. You can start with materials that are right for your English level, then continue with more difficult texts.

You can also improve your English by listening to podcast music and watching movies. This will allow you to hear different accents and improve your listening skills.

Finally, think about taking an English language course if you can. In a classroom with an experienced instructor, you can get help, feedback and a chance to practice with other students.

questions.question: What is the best title for the text?
questions.explanation: Bài văn nói về nhiều cách học tiếng Anh (online, đọc sách, nghe, đi học). Tiêu đề phù hợp nhất: 'Ways to learn English' = Các cách học tiếng Anh.
questions.expansion: Kỹ năng đọc: Main idea — tìm ý chính bằng cách đọc câu đầu mỗi đoạn và tổng hợp.

questions.question: Which word has the CLOSEST meaning to the word "method" in paragraph 1?
questions.explanation: 'method' = phương pháp, cách thức. 'Way' = cách — có nghĩa gần nhất. 'One popular method' ≈ 'One popular way'.
questions.expansion: Synonyms of 'method': way, approach, technique, manner, procedure, strategy.

questions.question: What does the word "its" in paragraph 1 refer to?
questions.explanation: 'There are many ways to learn English, and each has ITS own benefits' → 'its' thay thế cho 'each way to learn English' (mỗi cách học).
questions.expansion: Pronoun reference: 'its' (possessive) thay thế cho danh từ số ít ở phía trước. Cần đọc cả câu để xác định.

questions.question: According to the text, which is NOT mentioned as a suggestion for learning English?
questions.explanation: Bài văn đề cập: đọc (reading), nói chuyện với người bản xứ, học qua video. KHÔNG đề cập 'traveling to another country' (du lịch nước ngoài).
questions.expansion: Kỹ năng đọc: NOT mentioned — đọc kỹ từng đáp án và đối chiếu với bài để tìm thông tin KHÔNG được nhắc đến.

questions.question: What is mentioned as an important aspect of learning English online?
options: Using only apps for quick results.
Avoiding video lessons to focus on written exercises.
Practicing with native speakers through real-time conversations.
Relying solely on the Internet for complete language mastery.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2: 'even real-time conversations with native speakers' — luyện tập với người bản xứ qua hội thoại thời gian thực là khía cạnh quan trọng.
questions.expansion: Bài cũng nhấn mạnh: 'the internet alone might not be enough' — học online cần kết hợp với các hoạt động khác.

sections.title: III. WRITING - Part 1
sections.instruction: Choose A, B, C, or D to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the sentence given.

questions.question: Singapore is a multilingual country. It has four official languages.
options: Singapore is a multilingual country which have four official languages.
Singapore is a multilingual country who has four official languages.
Singapore is a multilingual country which has four official languages.
Singapore is a multilingual country who have four official languages.
questions.explanation: Dùng 'which' (cho vật/quốc gia) + 'has' (số ít, vì 'country' là danh từ số ít). 'Singapore is a multilingual country WHICH HAS four official languages.'
questions.expansion: Nối câu bằng mệnh đề quan hệ: Danh từ chung → which/that. Chia động từ theo danh từ tiền ngữ (antecedent). 'Country' (số ít) → has.

questions.question: We learnt about the vital role of clean water on Earth. Its surface is mostly covered by water.
options: We learnt about the vital role of clean water on Earth, which surface is mostly covered by water.
We learnt about the vital role of clean water on Earth, whose surface is mostly covered by water.
We learnt about the vital role of clean water on Earth, who surface is mostly covered by water.
We learnt about the vital role of clean water on Earth, what surface is mostly covered by water.
questions.explanation: 'whose' = mà ... của nó (sở hữu). 'Earth, WHOSE surface is mostly covered by water' = Trái Đất, mà bề mặt của nó phần lớn được bao phủ bởi nước.
questions.expansion: 'Whose' dùng cho cả người và vật trong mệnh đề quan hệ để chỉ sở hữu. Thay thế cho: its, his, her, their.

questions.question: English is now the most popular language. A lot of people learn it.
options: English is now the most popular language a lot of people learn it.
English is now the most popular language a lot of people learn.
English is now the most popular language which a lot of people learn it.
English is now the most popular language which lot of people learn.
questions.explanation: Mệnh đề quan hệ rút gọn: bỏ 'which/that' khi nó là tân ngữ. 'The most popular language (that) a lot of people learn.' — bỏ 'that' và không giữ 'it'.
questions.expansion: Contact clause (mệnh đề quan hệ rút gọn): Khi đại từ quan hệ làm tân ngữ, có thể lược bỏ nó. Ví dụ: The book (which/that) I bought = Cuốn sách tôi mua.

questions.question: Vietnamese people use English to communicate with foreigners. Foreigners come to Viet Nam to work, study, or visit.
options: Vietnamese people use English to communicate with foreigners they come to Viet Nam to work, study, or visit.
Vietnamese people use English to communicate with foreigners come to Viet Nam to work, study, or visit.
Vietnamese people use English to communicate with foreigners which come to Viet Nam to work, study, or visit.
Vietnamese people use English to communicate with foreigners who come to Viet Nam to work, study, or visit.
questions.explanation: 'who' là đại từ quan hệ thay thế cho 'foreigners' (người). '...with foreigners WHO come to Viet Nam to work, study, or visit.'
questions.expansion: Đại từ quan hệ cho người: who (chủ ngữ), whom (tân ngữ). 'Foreigners' là người → dùng 'who'.

questions.question: My friend, Peter, plays the guitar. He has just released a CD.
options: My friend, Peter, who plays the guitar, has just released a CD.
My friend, Peter, who has just released a CD, plays the guitar.
My friend, Peter, who playing the guitar, has just released a CD.
My friend, Peter, who has just released a CD, playing the guitar.
questions.explanation: Mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định (có dấu phẩy): 'Peter, WHO PLAYS THE GUITAR, has just released a CD.' — Thông tin chính: vừa ra CD. Thông tin phụ: chơi guitar.
questions.expansion: Non-defining relative clause: Dùng dấu phẩy, không dùng 'that'. Mệnh đề bổ sung thông tin thêm, bỏ đi câu vẫn hoàn chỉnh.

questions.question: "Can I do the shopping when I am here?"
options: I asked the guide whether I could do the shopping when I was there.
I asked the guide whether I can do the shopping when I was there.
I asked the guide if I could do the shopping when I am there.
I asked the guide if I could do the shopping when I was here.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: can → could, am → was, here → there. 'I asked the guide WHETHER I COULD do the shopping when I WAS THERE.'
questions.expansion: Quy tắc tường thuật: Lùi thì (can → could, am → was), đổi đại từ (I → I giữ nguyên vì người nói tường thuật), đổi trạng từ (here → there, now → then).

questions.question: "Are you willing to travel this weekend?" she asked.
options: She asked me am I willing to travel this weekend.
She asked me if I am willing to travel this weekend.
She asked me was I willing to travel that weekend.
She asked me if I was willing to travel that weekend.
questions.explanation: Reported speech yes/no question: S + asked + O + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì). are willing → was willing, this weekend → that weekend.
questions.expansion: Câu hỏi Yes/No tường thuật: KHÔNG đảo ngữ. Dùng if/whether + trật tự S + V. Sai: asked me was I → Đúng: asked me if I was.

questions.question: "Do you want to look for a new job?" Ellie asked Stan.
options: Ellie asked Stan did he want to look for a new job.
Ellie asked Stan do you want to look for a new job.
Ellie asked Stan if he wanted to look for a new job.
Ellie asked Stan whether he wants to look for a new job.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: Do you want → if he wanted (đổi you → he, lùi thì want → wanted). 'Ellie asked Stan IF HE WANTED to look for a new job.'
questions.expansion: Lưu ý: Không giữ trợ động từ do/does/did trong mệnh đề tường thuật. Sai: asked did he want → Đúng: asked if he wanted.

questions.question: "Are they coming to this meeting?" he asked.
options: He asked me if they were coming to that meeting.
He asked me whether they are coming to that meeting.
He asked that they were coming to that meeting.
He asked did they come to this meeting.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: are coming → were coming, this meeting → that meeting. 'He asked me IF THEY WERE COMING to THAT meeting.'
questions.expansion: Thay đổi trạng từ trong tường thuật: this → that, these → those, here → there, now → then, today → that day, tomorrow → the next day.

questions.question: "Do you want to go to the cinema tonight?" she asked.
options: She asked if I wanted to go to the cinema tonight.
She asked whether I wanted to go to the cinema that night.
She asked me if I wanted to go to the cinema that night.
She asked if I wanted to go to the cinema that night.
questions.explanation: 'She asked ME if I wanted to go to the cinema THAT NIGHT.' — Có tân ngữ 'me', lùi thì want → wanted, tonight → that night.
questions.expansion: Cả B, C, D đều đúng ngữ pháp, nhưng C đầy đủ nhất vì có tân ngữ 'me'. Trong bài thi, chọn đáp án đầy đủ và chính xác nhất.

sections.title: IV. WRITING - Part 2A
sections.instruction: Write a short paragraph/description or an email about a topic given.
sections.prompt: Write a paragraph about some tips to improve vocabulary learning based on the cues given.
sections.context: I have learnt English for six years and I usually find it challenging to learn its vocabulary. Here are some tips I have tried to improve my vocabulary learning.
cues: 1. Firstly, I / spend time / read / different kinds / English books.
2. My mum / buy / me / English-English dictionary / three years ago.
3. The dictionary / also help / me / understand / better / when / I use the word.
4. I / have / the habit / copying / all new words / a notebook.
5. Finally, I / take / every opportunity / speak / people / in English.
sections.sampleAnswer:
I have learnt English for six years and I usually find it challenging to learn its vocabulary. Here are some tips I have tried to improve my vocabulary learning.

Firstly, I spend time reading different kinds of English books. When I see a new word, I try to guess its meaning from the sentence. Secondly, I use a good dictionary. My mum bought me an English-English dictionary three years ago. The dictionary also helps me understand better when I use the word. Thirdly, I have made my own vocabulary notebook. I have the habit of copying all new words into a notebook. This way I can know how many words I have learnt and can revise the words easily. Finally, I take every opportunity to speak with people in English. I have done these things regularly and now I am quite confident about my English vocabulary.
sections.explanation: Đoạn văn sử dụng các từ nối (Firstly, Secondly, Thirdly, Finally) để liên kết ý. Mỗi gợi ý được mở rộng thành 1-2 câu hoàn chỉnh. Thì sử dụng: hiện tại đơn (thói quen), hiện tại hoàn thành (kinh nghiệm).

sections.title: IV. WRITING - Part 2B
sections.instruction: Write a paragraph about tourism in Ninh Thuan based on the cues given.
sections.prompt: Write a paragraph about tourism in Ninh Thuan based on the cues given.
sections.context: Ninh Thuan is a province in central Viet Nam. It has recently become a popular destination for tourists.
cues: 1. Sea lovers / can / swim / the sunny white-sand beaches / boat / in Vinh Hy Bay.
2. Those who enjoy nature / can visit / Nam Cuong sandhill, which / especially / beautiful / dawn or sunset.
3. Ninh Thuan / be / also / popular / the unique culture / its Cham minority ethnic group.
4. You can attend / one / their / many festivals / the year.
5. Ninh Thuan / offer / visitors / wide range of / homestays / hotels.
sections.sampleAnswer:
Ninh Thuan is a province in central Viet Nam. It has recently become a popular destination for tourists.

Sea lovers can swim in the sunny white-sand beaches in Vinh Hy Bay. Those who enjoy nature can visit Nam Cuong sandhill, which is especially beautiful at dawn or sunset. Ninh Thuan is also popular with the unique culture and art of its Cham minority ethnic group. You can attend one of their many festivals during the year. Ninh Thuan offers visitors a wide range of homestays and hotels. There are so many choices that it is up to you.
sections.explanation: Đoạn văn giới thiệu du lịch Ninh Thuận với các điểm: bãi biển (Vịnh Hy), thiên nhiên (đồi cát Nam Cương), văn hóa Chăm, lễ hội, và chỗ ở. Sử dụng thì hiện tại đơn vì mô tả sự thật/thông tin chung.
